'''Bigluu''' was a [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] bouncer at the [[Corusca Gem casino|Corusca Gem Casino]]. He had a severe [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] addiction, and although he dreamed of opening his own [[Casino/Legends|casino]] someday, he generally wasted all his money gambling instead of saving it.

{{Char-stub}}
